displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess
synopsis: Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess was the fourth story-arc in the Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron comics. It ran from October 1, 1996 to February 1, 1997. Michael A. Stackpole based it on the myth of Anastasia.
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess
